title: Milan
writer: Athreya Mullapudi, Virendra Sinha, Adurthi Subba Rao
plot: On the banks of the holy River Ganga, Gopi, a ferryman conducts an unconsummated romance with Radha, a girl from the upper classes. At the same time, he rejects the advances of Gauri, a girl from his own village, who is attracting...
